description: Normalized findings — one record per detection. `coverageStatus` is one of 'already-implemented' / 'partial-match' / 'new' (the unlock-coverage contract). The orthogonal `ported` boolean marks entries this sweep ships an executable JS port for in extendedAlgorithms.generated.js (joined by `tag`).

algorithms.docstring: Aisin AS68RC/AS69RC TCM — 3-stage sub/add/imul/not chain, indexed by seed & 7.

Alpine RA3/RA4 radio — different LCG constants, XOR 0x58C2.
    
    Used by: mid-spec 7" UConnect 4 Alpine head units.

Alpine Radio Amplifier Kit — LCG pair XOR 0x4E2B.
    
    Used by: early UConnect 4 RA4 low-spec head units.

XTEA-based seed-key. Seed packed big-endian.
    Triggered for UCONNECT (0x149) or RADIO_FGA (0x14E) at access level 5.
bosch_abs.dll — Bosch ABS.  GF(2) bit-indexed. Self-test 16/16, emu 5/5 ✓
CDA6 — BCM/ABS/IPC primary
Check if key is a simple function of seed (XOR, byte-rev, etc).
algorithms.rationale: Diagnostic helper — checks if a captured (seed, key) pair matches a trivial transform (identity, byte-reverse, NOT, ROL/ROR…). Not a unlock cipher; lives in srtlab_seedkey_capture.py for offline forensics. The corresponding helper already lives in the in-repo python toolchain — no JS port needed.

algorithms.docstring: Cummins ISB 6.7L — 16-entry 32-bit table, 4 rotating XORs + seed + 0x55111511.
DCX PTCM — LCG(0x41C64E6D, 0x3039) pair ^ 0xF3DD1133.
AlfaOBD algorithm-catalog row 'dispatch' (10 variants).
Mercedes EGS52 — (seed ^ 0x5AA5A5A5) * 0x5AA5A5A5.

XTEA-based seed-key. Seed packed little-endian.
    Triggered when af::ix=true AND af::ge=51 AND af::aj=5.
GPEC — 16-round XTEA-style Feistel using DAIMLERCHRYSLER3 as key.
Simple bit-shuffle seed-key (AlfaOBD ad::ht).
huntsville_bcm.dll — Chrysler BCM/FCM.  Self-test 10/10, emu 5/5 ✓

Harman Huntsville radio — 8-entry table, 5 XORs shifts (13,10,7,4,0), xor 0xCA59.
    
    Used by: 8.4" UConnect 4/4C RA3/RA4 head units.
may_scofield_itm.dll — ITM.  Self-test 8/8, emu 5/5 ✓
AlfaOBD algorithm-catalog row 'meta' (3 variants).

Mitsubishi RAR — ((seed ^ 0x7368) * 2 + 0x2A) ^ 0x6974.
    
    Used by: 5" UConnect 3 RA1/RA2 head units.
motorola_tipm7.dll — TIPM_7.  Self-test 10/10, emu 5/5 ✓
NGC gas engine — 1 right-rotate, 5 table XORs, xor 0x537E.
NGC transmission — 4 right-rotates, different shifts and table, xor 0x1EA4.
PowerTrain Integrated Module (LX) — 5 table XORs with unusual i2 packing.
GPEC shift-XOR — 5 rounds
trw_abs.dll — TRW ABS.  Self-test 10/10, emu 5/5 ✓
Venom PCM — cascading shift-derived indices, xor 0xAB56.

Parameterized linear cipher (matches AlfaOBD ad::w6).

    Each per-ECU wrapper is just this function with specific (r, s) constants.
Compute w6 key using a pre-catalogued wrapper's parameters.
algorithms.rationale: Dispatcher wrapper — looks up (r, s) from AOBD_W6_TABLE and forwards to `w6(seed, r, s)`. The cipher itself (`w6`) is already in algos.js as `alfaW6` / `alfaW6By`, surfaced in SeedTab via the AlfaOBD lookup row and `alfa_w6_*` ALGOS entries.

algorithms.docstring: AlfaOBD algorithm-catalog row 'w7' (360 variants).
wcm.dll — Wireless Control Module.  emu 20/20 ✓

Legacy 4-byte SGW seed → 4-byte key (high word of XTEA block).
    
    Loads seed into v0, (~seed) into v1, one XTEA(32) block with SGW key.
    Returns the high 32 bits as the 4-byte UDS 27 02 key.

8-byte SGW variant — flexible seed input.
    
    seed may be:
      - int             → v0=seed, v1=~seed (matches xtea_sgw legacy path)
      - bytes of len 4  → v0=seed bytes, v1=~v0
      - bytes of len 8  → v0=bytes[0:4], v1=bytes[4:8] (raw from UDS 67 01)
    
    Returns 8 bytes big-endian (v0_cipher || v1_cipher). Some 2018+ SGWs 
    issue an 8-byte seed where v1 is chosen INDEPENDENTLY (not the 
    complement), which is why the bytes-of-8 path exists.
yazaki_fcm.dll — BCM on LX platform (Scat Pack/Hellcat).  emu 20/20 ✓
